SETTINGS_DESC: Keep your audio output device active to prevent negotiation delays, pops, and clicks on HDMI, SPDIF, and USB DAC outputs.
KEEPALIVE_ENABLED_DESC: Keeps the ALSA output device permanently open. Prevents HDMI/SPDIF receivers and USB DACs from losing signal lock during idle, eliminating the delay when playback resumes.
KEEPALIVE_MODE_DESC: MPD config: patch MPD ALSA settings (USB/SPDIF). Silence feeder: run a silence stream when idle (recommended for HDMI).
IDLE_DELAY_MS_DESC: How long to wait after stop or pause before starting the silence feeder. Only used in Silence feeder mode.
FEEDER_ALSA_DEVICE_DESC: ALSA device name for the silence feeder (e.g. volumioOutput). Only used in Silence feeder mode.
BUFFER_TIME_DESC: Increase to absorb sample rate transitions and reduce pops/clicks when switching between tracks of different formats. Leave on Default unless experiencing issues.
PERIOD_TIME_DESC: Adjust the ALSA period time. Smaller values reduce latency, larger values improve stability during format transitions. Leave on Default unless experiencing issues.
STOP_DSD_SILENCE_DESC: Play brief silence before stopping DSD playback to prevent noise that some DACs emit when a DSD stream ends abruptly.
